title: Flaky Indian Foie-Gras Kebabs
description: A rich and flaky Indian-inspired dish featuring seared foie-gras, perfect for curing hangovers or a special treat. This recipe uses nigiri-shaping techniques to create delicate, bite-sized kebabs.

ingredients.name: Foie Gras
ingredients.notes: High-quality, fresh foie gras is essential for this recipe

ingredients.name: Ghee
ingredients.notes: Use clarified butter for the best results

ingredients.name: Garam Masala
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for the perfect blend

ingredients.name: Cumin
ingredients.notes: Use whole seeds for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Coriander
ingredients.notes: Use whole seeds for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Use pure, raw honey for the best results

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (375°F).
Rinse the foie gras under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the foie gras with salt and pepper to taste.
Form the foie gras into small, round shapes, about 1 inch in diameter.
Dip each foie gras shape into the ghee, coating lightly.
Roll each foie gras shape in the garam masala, cumin, and coriander.
Place the foie gras kebabs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Grill the foie gras kebabs for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Serve the foie gras kebabs on a bed of cilantro, with a drizzle of lemon juice and honey.
Serve with naan bread for a complete meal
